˗ˏˋ ★ ˎˊ˗

Wanda has lost everything.

Vision, her boys, her status among the Avengers. It's only a matter of time before Strange comes back and finishes what he started at Wundagore. She had been foolish, yes, but that didn't heal the ache in her heart. Distraught at the loss of her family, Wanda does what any self-respecting mother would do. She searches for a new one. And she finds that with you - a sweet, cheerful woman in the small New Jeresy town of Westview. You're just so perfect for her, or at least she thinks you can be. While attending a neighborly cookout that you host in the nearby park, and seeing another witch's eye on her prize, she decides to make you hers.
